plugin.name: Enjoy, and please endorse if you like the mod
plugin.description:
Apparel Preview lets you see armor, clothing and jewelry on your character before you equip it, straight from the menu. In a container, barter or inventory menu, hover an item and press the preview key (C on keyboard, R3 on controller), or use the Preview button on the item card, and the piece appears on you without equipping it. Nothing you are wearing changes, and nothing is written to your save.
That is all there is to it.
Source, docs and issue tracker: https://github.com/maartenharms/apparel-preview
Thanks for installing, and if you enjoy it, a kind endorsement is always appreciated.
